$schema: Research tasks. Each task: id, description, status (open|in-progress|done|blocked), purpose, relatedPeople[], relatedEvidence[], priority.

tasks.description: Search Cape Girardeau deed books for any Jacob Bess dower release between marriage (1814) and 1859.
tasks.purpose: Resolve whether Barbara Slinkard predeceased Jacob (consistent with 1859 deed showing Jacob alone) or whether something else explains the missing widow.

tasks.description: Search Cape Girardeau probate / orphans court files for Jacob Slinkard (MO) full estate file. Identify all heirs by name, not just Barbara and Polly.
tasks.purpose: Establish complete sibling group of Barbara Slinkard. Currently only Barbara and Polly (A) are known minors.

tasks.description: Search Cape Girardeau guardianship/curator files for any other Slinkard, Best, or Bess minors of the relevant period.
tasks.purpose: Find additional sibling structure or links between Best/Bess and Slinkard families.

tasks.description: Cross-check Slinkard married names: confirm whether Catharine Slinkard (m. Smith 1828), Katherine (m. Link 1834), and Catharine (Daniel's heir) are the same person or different.
tasks.purpose: Resolve possible-duplicate ambiguity for Catharine/Katherine Slinkard.

tasks.description: Resolve whether 'John Slinkard m. Nancy Stroder' (marriage index) and 'John Slinkard m. Viney Stroder' (1839 Cape Girardeau record) are the same marriage with a transcription variant — or two different events.
tasks.purpose: Conflict resolution for John Slinkard's spouse.

tasks.description: Investigate the '1823 Daniel Slinkard & wife Hannah' deed. Confirm/refute: prior wife before Eve Morrison, transcription error, or different Daniel.
tasks.purpose: Resolve spouse conflict for Daniel Slinkard (d. 1838).

tasks.description: Search NC probate, deed, and court records for any document naming Peter Best/Bess's children individually (1832 will leaves to 'my children' but does not list them).
tasks.purpose: Move Jacob Bess Sr. → Peter Best from SUPPORTED toward PROVEN by finding direct parent-child statement.

tasks.description: Find a record bridging Frederick Slinker (NC, 1768–1794) and Frederick Slinker (MO, 1818–1833) — or proving they are different people.
tasks.purpose: Resolve whether NC and MO Frederick are the same individual.

tasks.description: Find a NC→MO migration record for Jacob Slinkard between 1788 (NC heir-at-law deed) and 1818 (first MO appearance). Land transfer, military, or court record naming origin.
tasks.purpose: Bridge NC Jacob (1788 heir) and MO Jacob (d. <1823).

tasks.description: Identify the father of David & Jacob Slinkard, minors under guardianship of Peter Critz (settlement 6 Dec 1816).
tasks.purpose: Determine if these minors are connected to the main Slinkard line. RESOLVED: ~1813–1816 guardianship/court record names Jacob Slinkard (deceased) as the father of all four minors (Polly, Barbara, David, Jacob). David and Jacob (minor) re-attached to jacob-slinkard-mo with PROVEN status.

tasks.description: Verify the date of the guardianship/court record naming Jacob Slinkard (deceased) as father of Polly, Barbara, David, and Jacob (minor). User noted it as ~1813–1816, but the 1818 deed (ev-1818-jacob-slinkard-mo-deed) shows Jacob alive selling a town lot — those cannot both be true for the same Jacob.
tasks.purpose: Resolve temporal conflict between the guardianship record (Jacob deceased) and the 1818 deed (Jacob alive). Likely outcomes: (a) guardianship record is actually later than ~1813–1816; (b) two distinct Jacob Slinkards in MO; (c) 1818 deed refers to a different Jacob.

tasks.description: Find original citation (court book, page, or volume) for the ~1813–1816 guardianship/court record listing Jacob Slinkard's four minors. Currently filed under user-provided summary only.
tasks.purpose: Anchor the strongest piece of Slinkard parentage evidence to an original record.

tasks.description: Locate primary marriage record for Edward B. Bess and Jane Sanders/Saunders.
tasks.purpose: Confirm Jane's maiden name (currently STRONGLY SUPPORTED via Albert's death record only).

tasks.description: Locate marriage record for Rhoda B. Bess and Joseph Labrot.
tasks.purpose: Move Rhoda↔Joseph link from SUPPORTED to PROVEN.

tasks.description: Locate Virginia Labrot's birth, marriage, and death records.
tasks.purpose: Anchor the bottom of the direct line with primary documents.

tasks.description: Find Jacob Bess in 1840 Cape Girardeau / Bollinger County census.
tasks.purpose: Fill the census gap between 1830 and 1850; may show wife present.

tasks.description: Search Lincoln County, NC estate file of Boston Best Sr. (1809) for any heir list, division of estate, or guardianship of minors.
tasks.purpose: Confirm Peter Best as Boston's son with a direct statement.

tasks.description: Research 'Bessville, Missouri' — the place named on Albert Ransom Bess's death record. Confirm location, founding family, surviving records.
tasks.purpose: Possible community founded by or named for the Bess family — could surface family records.
